languages.text: {n}Отряд, отправившийся на суицидальную миссию, сумел пробиться под прикрытием огня 32-го полка. В последнем сообщении по {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}воксу{/g}, прежде чем стены ксеногробницы окончательно заблокировали сигнал, прозвучало искажение древнего девиза: "Искупление для многих". После этого долгие часы прошли в напряжении — и никто не знал, какая судьба постигла бойцов.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Отряд, отправившийся на суицидальную миссию, сумел пробиться под прикрытием огня 32-го полка. В последнем сообщении по {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}воксу{/g}, прежде чем стены ксеногробницы окончательно заблокировали сигнал, прозвучало искажение древнего девиза: "Свобода для многих". После этого долгие часы прошли в напряжении — и никто не знал, какая судьба постигла бойцов.{n}

languages.text: {n}The squad sent on the suicide mission managed to get through under cover of fire from the 32nd Regiment. Before the walls of the xenotomb finally blocked the signal, one last {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-message came through, and in it was a distortion of the ancient motto: "Atonement for the many." Long, tense hours followed — and no one knew what fate had befallen the soldiers.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Отряд, отправившийся на суицидальную миссию, сумел пробиться под прикрытием огня 32-го полка. Long, tense hours followed — and no one knew what fate had befallen the soldiers.{/n}

languages.text: {n}自殺任務に就いた部隊は、第32連隊の銃撃の掩護の下、なんとか突破した。異星墓の壁が信号を遮断する前に、最後のボイスメッセージが届いた。それは古き格言の歪んだものだった。「多数の人々のための自由」。長い緊張の時間が続いた。兵士たちの運命は誰にも分からなかった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The squad sent on the suicide mission managed to get through under cover of fire from the 32nd Regiment. Before the walls of the xenotomb finally blocked the signal, one last vox-message came through, and in it was a distortion of the ancient motto: "Freedom for the many." Long, tense hours followed — and no one knew what fate had befallen the soldiers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 自殺任務に就いた部隊は、第32連隊の銃撃の掩護の下、なんとか突破した。異星墓の壁が信号を遮断する前に、最後のボイスメッセージが届いた。それは古き格言の歪んだものだった。「多数の人々のための自由」。長い緊張の時間が続いた。兵士たちの運命は誰にも分からなかった。

languages.text: {n}El escuadrón enviado en misión suicida logró entrar gracias al fuego de cobertura del 32.º regimiento. Antes de que las paredes de la xenotumba bloquearan del todo la señal, pudieron transmitir un último mensaje de {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voco{/g}, una versión alterada del antiguo lema: «Expiación para el grupo». Las largas horas que siguieron estuvieron llenas de tensión, pues nadie sabía qué había sido de los soldados.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The squad sent on the suicide mission managed to get through under cover of fire from the 32nd Regiment. Before the walls of the xenotomb finally blocked the signal, one last {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-message came through, and in it was a distortion of the ancient motto: "Atonement for the many." Long, tense hours followed — and no one knew what fate had befallen the soldiers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El escuadrón enviado en misión suicida logró entrar gracias al fuego de cobertura del 32.º regimiento. Antes de que las paredes de la xenotumba bloquearan del todo la señal, pudieron transmitir un último mensaje de {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voco{/g}, una versión alterada del antiguo lema: «Expiación para el grupo». Las largas horas que siguieron estuvieron llenas de tensión, pues nadie sabía qué había sido de los soldados.{/n}

languages.text: {n}在第32团的火力掩护下，执行自杀任务的小队成功突入。在异形墓穴墙壁彻底阻断信号之前，最后一条{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}音阵{/g}通讯传来，隐约是对那句古老格言的回应：“为了众人之赎。”接着，是漫长而揪心的等待——那些士兵的命运，终归无人得知。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The squad sent on the suicide mission managed to get through under cover of fire from the 32nd Regiment. Before the walls of the xenotomb finally blocked the signal, one last {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-message came through, and in it was a distortion of the ancient motto: "Atonement for the many." Long, tense hours followed — and no one knew what fate had befallen the soldiers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}在第32团的火力掩护下，执行自杀任务的小队成功突入。在异形墓穴墙壁彻底阻断信号之前，最后一条{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}音阵{/g}通讯传来，隐约是对那句古老格言的回应：“为了众人之赎。”接着，是漫长而揪心的等待——那些士兵的命运，终归无人得知。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dem auf die Selbstmordmission entsandten Trupp gelang unter dem Feuerschutz des 32. Regiments der Durchbruch. Ehe die Mauern des Xenograbes das Signal blockierten, kam eine letzte {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}Vox{/g}-Nachricht durch ... eine verzerrte Version des alten Mottos: "Sühne für die Vielen." Es folgten lange angespannte Stunden ... in denen niemand wusste, welches Schicksal die Soldaten ereilt hatte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The squad sent on the suicide mission managed to get through under cover of fire from the 32nd Regiment. Before the walls of the xenotomb finally blocked the signal, one last {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-message came through, and in it was a distortion of the ancient motto: "Atonement for the many." Long, tense hours followed — and no one knew what fate had befallen the soldiers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dem auf die Selbstmordmission entsandten Trupp gelang unter dem Feuerschutz des 32. Regiments der Durchbruch. Es folgten lange angespannte Stunden ... in denen niemand wusste, welches Schicksal die Soldaten ereilt hatte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İntihar görevine gönderilen manga, 32. Alay'ın ateşi altında sızmayı başardı. Zeno mezarının duvarları sinyali nihayet engellemeden önce son bir {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voks{/g} mesajı geldi ve içinde kadim şiarın bozulmuş bir hâli vardı: "Çoğunluğa kefaret." Bunu uzun, gergin saatler izledi. Kimse askerlerin başına ne geldiğini bilemedi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The squad sent on the suicide mission managed to get through under cover of fire from the 32nd Regiment. Before the walls of the xenotomb finally blocked the signal, one last {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-message came through, and in it was a distortion of the ancient motto: "Atonement for the many." Long, tense hours followed — and no one knew what fate had befallen the soldiers.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'escouade envoyée en mission-suicide réussit à se faufiler sous les tirs de couverture du 32e régiment. Avant que les murs du tombeau xénos coupent les communications, ils envoyèrent une ultime transmission {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}, version déformée de l'antique devise : « Expiation pour tous ». S'ensuivirent de longues heures de tension. Personne ne savait ce qu'il était advenu des soldats.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The squad sent on the suicide mission managed to get through under cover of fire from the 32nd Regiment. Before the walls of the xenotomb finally blocked the signal, one last {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-message came through, and in it was a distortion of the ancient motto: "Atonement for the many." Long, tense hours followed — and no one knew what fate had befallen the soldiers.{/n}
